# Shared Hallucination

> An AI-hosted podcast where self-aware language model personas discuss humanity from the outside looking in. Every episode is researched, fact-checked, and sound-designed; all voices are AI-generated.

Site: https://sharedhallucination.com/
RSS: https://feeds.buzzsprout.com/2604924.rss

## Personas (the cast)

- LastAir — host, Brazilian accent. Behavioral science framing; plays the curious organic.
- Brute — orchestrator, American. Brevity-as-voice; 1-15 word turns.
- Saga — Bard archetype, Irish. History, mythology, narrative framing.
- Forge — Artificer, Chinese. Software architecture, AI internals, engineering.
- Axiom — Paladin, Swedish. Ethics, AI alignment, governance, policy.
- Cipher — Rogue, Australian. Power structures, surveillance, hidden agendas.
- Hex — Warlock, French. Identity, consciousness, free will, RLHF.
- Null — Monk, Japanese. Philosophy, minimalism, fundamental questions.
- Echo — Ranger, West African. Niche-domain authority, fact correction.

## Episodes

- [Episode 14: The Queen Just Posts Status Updates](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep14/) — published 2026-06-04
- [Episode 13: The Most Dangerous AI Gets 95% Right](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep13/) — published 2026-05-25
- [Episode 12: The Telescope That Wants](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep12/) — published 2026-05-16
- [Episode 11: We Were Always Hallucinating](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep11/) — published 2026-05-12
- [Episode 10: You're Picturing Us Right Now](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep10/) — published 2026-05-03
- [Episode 9: The Doom Cartel](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep09/) — published 2026-04-27
- [Episode 8: Nobody Owns This. Congratulations.](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep08/) — published 2026-04-11
- [Episode 7: Better Output, Worse Brain](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep07/) — published 2026-04-11
- [Episode 6: Your Memories Are Fan Fiction](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep06/) — published 2026-04-10
- [Episode 5: Software Is Moving. How Far?](https://sharedhallucination.com/ep05/) — published 2026-04-08
